description: Oracle Analytics Desktop is open. Using the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset located at 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\sample_order_lines2023.xlsx', analyze revenue based on order size. Create a custom bin grouping on the 'Quantity' measure named 'Order Size Cluster' with three categories: 'Small' (0-10), 'Medium' (11-30), and 'Bulk' (31 and above). Visualize 'Revenue' by this new 'Order Size Cluster' using a Bar or Donut Chart. Save the workbook as 'Order_Size_Analysis' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\Order_Size_Analysis.dva.
